message.flag: jsPDF / pdfmake / wkhtmltopdf cannot emit tagged (accessible) PDFs; the output is untagged no matter how semantic the source is. Use headless-Chrome page.pdf with tagged:true, PDFKit tagged mode, WeasyPrint, or tagged LaTeX

fix.hint: Switch to a tagged-PDF capable path: headless-Chrome page.pdf({ tagged: true }), PDFKit tagged mode, WeasyPrint, or tagged LaTeX.

false_positive_notes: Fires on the library name even when a separate tagged-output path also exists in the project.

message.flag: page.pdf()/printToPDF without tagged: true; print-to-PDF output is untagged by default in Playwright. Set tagged: true explicitly and verify with PAC

fix.hint: Pass { tagged: true } to page.pdf()/printToPDF and verify the result with PAC or veraPDF.

false_positive_notes: A tagged: true anywhere in the file suppresses this, even on an unrelated call.

message.flag: PDFKit document without { tagged: true }; also set lang and displayTitle and build the structure tree (doc.struct) for headings and tables

fix.hint: Construct PDFKit with { tagged: true }, set lang and displayTitle, and add doc.struct nodes for headings, lists, and tables.

false_positive_notes: A tagged: true anywhere in the file suppresses this.

message.flag: LaTeX source without \DocumentMetadata; recent kernels support \DocumentMetadata{lang=..., tagging=on} for tagged (accessible) output

fix.hint: Add \DocumentMetadata{lang=..., tagging=on} at the top of the document on a recent LaTeX kernel.

false_positive_notes: Fires for a LaTeX document that lacks \DocumentMetadata even if accessibility is handled by another toolchain.
